data.title: Dogecoin Price: Will 800M Accumulation Spark a Reversal?
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) was battling to stay above the $0. 15 level as of press time having closed green in the last two days. Dogecoin’s Whale Activity Surge With price at a key accumulation zone, whales in only 48 hours, that is addresses with over 1 Billion DOGE coins, collected more than 800 Million DOGE
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/17/dogecoin-price-will-800m-accumulation-spark-a-reversal/

data.title: AI takes nearly 60% of global venture capital dollars in Q1: Pitchbook
data.description:
Artificial intelligence startups received the lion’s share of venture capital investments across the globe in the first quarter of 2025, according to new data from Pitchbook. “Investors still have an AI FOMO [fear of missing out] problem,” the research firm said in an April 17 report, which revealed that 57. 9% of global venture capital dollars in Q1 went to AI and machine learning startups. Comparatively, the first quarter of 2024 saw just 28% of VC dollars channeled into AI startups
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ai-60-percent-venture-capital-dollars-q1-2025-pitchbook?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Vitalik condemns Polymarket’s launch of crypto KOL Tiffany Fong’s pregnancy prediction: boring and an invasion of privacy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The prediction platform Polymarket launched a pregnancy contest for crypto KOL Tiffany Fong. Previously, some people speculated that she might be secretly dating Kanye West or Elon Musk. Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin condemned this and said: "I personally think such predictions are very boring and violate a person's privacy and dignity."

data.title: LBank has launched Defiant (DEFIANT)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched Defiant (DEFIANT) at 12:20 (SGT) on April 17, and opened the DEFIANT/USDT trading pair. At present, the deposit business has been opened, and the withdrawal business will be opened at 12:00 on April 18.

data.title: The market value of "Base is for everyone" briefly exceeded 16.5 million US dollars, setting a new record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The market value of the "Base is for everyone" token briefly exceeded 16.5 million US dollars, setting a new record. The token was officially released by Base on the Zora platform on April 17 as part of its efforts to promote on-chain culture and content experiments. The market value has fluctuated dramatically due to community discussions and related token issuance. Odaily reminds users that Meme coins are highly volatile and participation should be cautious.

data.title: Solana Flashes Buy Signal Amid Major Potential Purchase
data.description:
As Solana (SOL) price action went above the key zone at the $120 level, the $130 zone proved to be a major barrier that need a break through for continued uptrend.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/16/solana-flashes-buy-signal-amid-major-potential-purchase/

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net outflow of $170 million yesterday, with Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC leading the way with a net outflow of $114 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 16, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$170 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock Bitcoin ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$30.5803 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow in history has reached US$39.673 billion.
The second is Bitwise ETF BITB, with a single-day net inflow of US$12.8131 million. Currently, BITB's total net inflow in history has reached US$1.976 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a single-day net outflow of US$114 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow in history has reached US$11.256 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$93.65 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.6%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$35.267 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $12.0062 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 7 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 16, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was 12.0062 million US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale ETF ETH, with a single-day net inflow of 2.2448 million US dollars. Currently, the total net inflow of ETH has reached 570 million US dollars.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale ETF ETHE, with a single-day net outflow of 8.199 million US dollars. Currently, the total net outflow of ETHE has reached 4.245 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 5.245 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.76%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.244 billion US dollars.

data.title: Huobi HTX has launched the Fireblocks Off-Exchange asset mapping function, and the test transaction volume has increased by 200%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Huobi HTX announced that it has recently completed the integration of Fireblocks Off-Exchange asset mapping function, aiming to further reduce the counterparty risk of the exchange and provide more effective protection for users. This function allows institutional users to always keep their assets in a self-controlled collateral account, and obtain a 1:1 credit line based on the collateral balance on the Huobi HTX platform, while avoiding risks and enjoying the flexible and efficient trading experience of centralized exchanges.
It is reported that since Fireblocks Off-Exchange was launched on Huobi HTX, many institutional customers have settled in, and the overall test trading volume has increased by up to 200%. Huobi HTX said that it will continue to cooperate with industry-leading technology companies to promote the platform's continuous innovation in security, compliance, technology and services, and provide a more secure, efficient and compliant trading environment for global institutional customers.

data.title: Galaxy Ventures I Completes $100 Million Fundraising, Exceeds Target
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Galaxy Digital's venture capital fund Galaxy Ventures I has completed $100 million in fundraising, exceeding the original target. The fund focuses on equity and token investments in early Web3 and crypto startups, and its investment areas cover infrastructure, DeFi, security, development tools and consumer applications. Fundraising documents show that Galaxy Ventures I has attracted at least 7 institutions to participate. The fund is led by Galaxy Digital CEO Mike Novogratz. (Cointelegraph)
